player_notes.jarred vanderbilt: Dislocated right pinkie sustained in Game 1 vs OKC. Monitor availability for Game 2; likely compromised or out.
player_notes.austin reaves: Shot 3-for-16 in Game 1 vs OKC with 4 turnovers, citing lingering effects of injury layoff. Significant shooting slump raises concern for 3PM and points props.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Posted 12-block triple-double in Game 1 loss to MIN; Wolves coach alleging at least 4 were missed goaltending calls. No availability concern — fully active and extremely high-volume producer.
player_notes.anthony edwards: Returned unexpectedly from injury in Game 1 vs SA, scoring 18 points. Availability confirmed; monitor minutes restriction risk in Game 2.
player_notes.donovan mitchell: Expressed frustration over lack of foul calls in playoffs, getting to line less than regular season. Points props may carry downside risk if FT volume stays suppressed.

game_notes.LAL vs OKC: Vanderbilt (dislocated right pinkie) likely out or limited for Game 2, thinning LAL's frontcourt rotation. Reaves in a deep shooting slump (3-16 Game 1), rotation implications if struggles continue.
game_notes.MIN vs SA: Edwards returned unexpectedly from injury for Game 1; monitor if minutes are restricted in Game 2. Wembanyama fully active and dominant defensively.
